programme.title: Devmanus Madhla Adhyay
programme.desc: S1 , E326 : While Gopal panics when Jamkar interrogates an unresponsive Saket, Jamkar grows increasingly frustrated. Meanwhile, Gopal avoids being seen by Saket and later attempts to silence him for good.

programme.title: Devmanus Madhla Adhyay
programme.desc: S1 , E327 : Gopal and Lali encounter obstacles, while trying to discard Saket's corpse. They attempt a stealthy relocation, but Naru Aaji suddenly intercepts them.

programme.title: Kamali
programme.desc: S1 , E317 : Gautam successfully convinces a reluctant Asavari to proceed with their marriage. However, drama unfolds at the ceremony when the groom mysteriously vanishes and Asavari walks out.

programme.title: Savlayachi Janu Savali
programme.desc: S1 , E570 : Jagannath develops a plan to safeguard the Gurukul after Savali raises alarms about Rajkumar's suspicious behaviour. Consequently, Monica confronts Ovi and Amruta as they try to exit the premises.

programme.title: Savlayachi Janu Savali
programme.desc: S1 , E571 : Led by Detective Dhananjay, Sarang and Sushila solve Kshama's issue, but Savali is heartbroken when Kshama wrongly claims that Sushila is Sarang's wife. Meanwhile, Monica moves against Rajkumar.

programme.title: Deep Jyoti
programme.desc: S1 , E42 : The Savekars prepare for Priti's engagement and an enraged Subhadra sparks chaos. Later, Priti confides her true motive to her and the Gaikwads become worried as they await the Savekars.

programme.title: Deep Jyoti
programme.desc: S1 , E43 : Subhadra's arrival worries Jyoti and Jayashree, while Deep reaches the spot disguised as a waiter, but gets recognized by Jyoti. Later, Priti's reaction to Swaraj's romantic gesture sparks tension.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: S1 , E481 : Sinchana demands Harish sign divorce papers while Janhavi insists on joining Jayant at work. Meanwhile, Siddhiraj cleverly convinces the family that Bhavana is the ideal election candidate.

programme.title: Tula Japnar Aahe
programme.desc: S1 , E416 : Meera falls for Manjiri's trap and drops the cowries in the 'agnikund'. Meanwhile, the previous night's incident leaves Maya confused and scared. Meera is startled on learning that Manjiri tricked her.

programme.title: Tula Japnar Aahe
programme.desc: S1 , E417 : Manjiri traps Devayani's soul and later, threatens Maya, who asks for a share in the property. Terrified, Maya reveals Manjiri's truth to Narmada. Devi Aaji shows Meera her mistake and guides her.

programme.title: Deep Jyoti
programme.desc: S1 , E42 : The Savekars prepare for Priti's engagement and an enraged Subhadra sparks chaos. Later, Priti confides her true motive to her and the Gaikwads become worried as they await the Savekars.

programme.title: Kamali
programme.desc: S1 , E318 : Kamali urges Annapurna to forgive Rajan, but it takes a moment of crisis to shatter the ice between them. Meanwhile, Kamini attempts to physically assault Rajan, prompting Annapurna to intervene.

programme.title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
programme.desc: S1 , E280 : Mallika and Arpita chastise Chingi. Soon after, when Dilip hears about the theft from Swanandi, he becomes troubled and then he pieces together the facts and reveals the reality to Mandakini.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E564 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Joy Baba Lokenath
programme.desc: S1 , E73 : A Bengali spiritual series narrating Baba Lokenath's teachings, miracles, and legacy, inspiring devotees through stories of faith, compassion, and divine guidance.

programme.title: Joy Baba Lokenath
programme.desc: S1 , E76 : Baba Loknath, an Indian saint, helps people through his miracles. He spends his life seeking enlightenment and finally attains Samadhi.

programme.title: Boss 2
programme.desc: Surya travels to Bangkok to seek revenge against the goons who tricked him and looted the people's money kept in his bank.

programme.title: Sultan: The Saviour
programme.desc: Raja Dutta and his sister Disha move to Kolkata to start afresh. But Disha is oblivious to Raja's past and his intention behind shifting to Kolkata.

programme.title: Baba Keno Chakar
programme.desc: When Rajnarayan asks his son to help out with the expenses for his sister's wedding, he refuses. As a result, he is forced to go from pillar to post to make ends meet.

programme.title: Pratham Dekha
programme.desc: Two struggling singers, who hope to make their way to the top, fall in love and fight to stay together amidst various societal barriers.

programme.title: Aakrosh
programme.desc: Two detectives investigate the disappearance of three medical students in a small village, but their search is hampered by corrupt local authorities.

programme.title: Loafer
programme.desc: Bikram is a selfless man who is unfairly hated by his family. However, after an arrest for helping a friend marry, he struggles to gain the respect of those he constantly protects.
